name: the-first-days-of-school
description: Harry and Rosemary Wong's The First Days of School — proven strategies for classroom management, effective teaching, establishing procedures, and starting the school year for maximum student success
useCase: Helps new and experienced teachers establish effective classrooms through procedures, positive expectations, and mastery teaching — starting from the first day of school.
knownRisks: Classroom management strategies may need adaptation for different age groups and contexts
